lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. So, what is this place?

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: This is my home, mundane human! What do you have in your pockets? Something tasty?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stay out of my pockets! I don't have anything that you want.

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: Ah, but do you have anything that *you* want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course I do!

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: Then you have something that implings want.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eh?

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: We want things you people want. They are tasty to us! The more you want them, the tastier they are!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, you collect things that humans want? Interesting... So, what would happen if I caught an impling in a butterfly net?

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: Don't do that! That would be cruel. But chase us, yes! That is good. Implings are not easy to catch. Especially ones with really tasty food.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, some of these implings have things that I will really want? Hmm, maybe it would be worth my while trying to catch some.

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: Going so soon?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, get me out of here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, no I'll hang around a bit longer.

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: Back where you came from, of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So not back to where the crop circle is now?

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: The aetheric thread connecting you to your own plane leads back to the wheat field where you came from. Obviously. So you will always go back to where you came from! Don't you humans know anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Evidently not.

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: You wanna leave?

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: You want to know about the portal? It is for leaving this place, of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where will I go if I leave?

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: Back where you came from, of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So not back to where the crop circle is now?

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: The aetheric thread connecting you to your own plane leads back to the wheat field where you came from. Obviously. So you will always go back to where you came from! Don't you humans know anything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Evidently not.

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: You wanna leave?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, get me out of here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ah, no I'll hang around a bit longer.

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: That doesn't look solved to me.

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: Well done [player name]. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Immenizz
lines.text: Here, solve this.
